globalPresenceSection1.description: With offices across four continents and a network of global partners, we provide seamless inventory and logistics solutions to businesses everywhere.

cta.title: Global Support, Local Expertise
cta.description: No matter where your business operates, our team is ready to provide the support you need, in your time zone and language.

globalPresenceSection2.description: With offices across four continents and a network of global partners, we provide seamless inventory and logistics solutions to businesses everywhere.

continents.name: North America
continents.description: Our North American operations span the continent with major hubs in the United States, Canada, and Mexico, providing comprehensive supply chain solutions to businesses of all sizes.

continents.name: Europe
continents.description: From our London headquarters to offices across the continent, we serve European businesses with localized expertise and global capabilities.

continents.name: Asia Pacific
continents.description: Our Asia Pacific presence connects businesses to the world's fastest-growing markets with offices in key financial and commercial hubs.

continents.name: Middle East & Africa
continents.description: Serving the rapidly growing markets of the Middle East and Africa with offices in strategic locations and deep regional expertise.
continents.coverage: UAE, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Egypt

timezone.title: 24/7 Global Coverage
timezone.description: Our teams are distributed across time zones to ensure continuous support and operations for your business, no matter where you're located.

cta.title: Connect With Our Global Team
cta.description: Whether you're looking for local support or global solutions, our team is ready to help you succeed.

globalPresenceSection3.description: With offices across four continents and a network of global partners, we provide seamless inventory and logistics solutions to businesses everywhere.

regions.name: Europe
regions.coverage: United Kingdom, Germany, France, Benelux, Nordics

regions.name: Asia Pacific
regions.coverage: Singapore, Japan, Australia, India, China, South Korea
regions.timezones: SGT, JST, AEST, IST, CST, KST

regions.name: Middle East & Africa
regions.coverage: UAE, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Egypt, Qatar

items.description: Our global headquarters in the heart of Silicon Valley, leading innovation in supply chain technology.
Our European headquarters serving clients across the continent with localized expertise.
Our Asia Pacific hub connecting businesses to the world's fastest-growing markets.
Strategic hub for the Middle East and Africa, serving rapidly growing markets.
